keyMappings:
# Insert your preferred key mappings here.
map <Tab> nextTab
map <S-Tab> previousTab
map J nextTab
map K previousTab

map D removeTab
map U restoreTab
unmap t
unmap x
unmap X
searchEngines:
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
y: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
np: https://search.nixos.org/packages?channel=26.05&query=%s NixPackages
no: https://search.nixos.org/options?channel=26.05&query=%s NixOptions
